name: Hoosier Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 15-oz can kidney beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large Dutch oven or soup kettle, brown the beef until no longer pink.
2. Add onions, celery, peppers, and garlic. Continue cooking until vegetables are tender.
3. Add all remaining ingredients except macaroni and beans. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 1 1/2 hours, adding macaroni for the last half hour of cooking time.
5. Stir in beans and heat through. (makes about 4 1/2 quarts)
